objective: Select and prove the operating mode for live Remote MCP monitoring while preserving payload-safe rehearsal and fail-closed evidence.
scope_boundary: Modify Remote MCP monitor operating-mode docs, governance registries, progress/backlog mirrors, issue #376 planning/validation/closeout artifacts, selected-mode rehearsal evidence, and generated graph/wiki artifacts.
Reuse the existing issue #372 monitor and issue #374 alert contracts; do not change Remote MCP bridge protocol behavior.
Do not commit Cloudflare credentials, bridge tokens, JWTs, HMAC keys, raw PII, production monitor payloads, or raw MCP payloads.
out_of_scope: Installing launchd on the operator machine from this PR.
Claiming production live monitor health without configured live evidence.
research_summary: Issue #372 added the recurring monitor and both GitHub Actions and launchd surfaces. Issue #374 added payload-safe alert artifacts. Issue #376 selects local launchd as the live-authoritative operating mode because live health requires local audit-copy access and stdio continuity proof; GitHub Actions remains the scheduled fixture harness and optional configured-live runner.

sprints.name: Operating-mode proof
sprints.goal: Document the selected live monitor surface and preserve payload-safe evidence for the selected-mode rehearsal and live fail-closed behavior.
tasks: Update active backlog mirrors for issue #376.
Update the Remote MCP runbook with the selected local launchd operating mode, GitHub Actions role, evidence capture, and operator response.
Update feature, service, and data-dictionary registry entries.
Generate selected-mode fixture monitor and alert evidence under raw/remote-mcp-monitor-operating-mode/.
Record live missing-config fail-closed evidence and validation results.
Run local validation, closeout hook, Local CI Gate, PR checks, and issue closeout.
acceptance_criteria: Operating mode is explicitly selected and justified.
Runbook documents live monitor setup, evidence capture, and operator response for the selected mode.
A payload-safe monitor alert artifact is preserved for the selected-mode rehearsal.
Live mode fails closed when required production configuration is absent.
Evidence scan proves preserved artifacts contain no raw SSNs, bearer-token material, Cloudflare Access markers, or JWT fragments.
Local tests and Local CI Gate pass.
Final AC: GitHub PR checks pass before closeout.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify the current monitor surfaces, active backlog gap, evidence paths, validation commands, and secret-safety pitfalls for issue #376.
specialist_reviews.summary: Accepted the need to mirror issue #376, preserve fixture/alert evidence, document the role split between GitHub Actions and launchd, and avoid claiming live health without production configuration.

alternate_model_review.summary: Accepted the issue #376 documentation/evidence shape. Implementation selects local launchd as live-authoritative because the live proof requires local audit-copy and stdio-continuity inputs.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #376 may update Remote MCP monitor operating-mode docs, registries, backlog mirrors, selected-mode rehearsal evidence, validation, closeout, and generated graph/wiki artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement the runbook/registry/evidence updates, validate locally, open PR, merge after checks pass, and close issue #376.

material_deviation_rules: If any preserved evidence includes secrets, JWT fragments, Cloudflare Access material, bearer-token material, raw PII, or raw MCP payloads, remove the artifact and rerun the proof from sanitized inputs.
If live configuration is absent, preserve fixture rehearsal and fail-closed evidence only; do not claim production live recurring health.
If GitHub Actions live mode cannot access copied audit evidence and stdio proof safely, keep it optional and treat local launchd as the selected live operating mode.
